name: Theodore the Sanctified, Disciple of Saint Pachomius
hieromartyrs Severian, Yakym, and Vitalii, slain in Drohobych
troparia: (Tone 1) You made the wilderness your dwelling, O Father Theodore, the bearer of God. * You became an angel in the flesh and a wonderworker. * Through fasts, vigils, and prayers, you obtained from God special graces to heal the sick * and to sanctify the souls of those who come to you with trust. * Glory to the One who gave you strength! * Glory to the One who crowned you! * Glory to the One who through your intercession grants healing to all!
kontakia: (Tone 2) You bloomed like a flower in the house of God, * bearing the fragrant fruit of virtue through your fasting. * You have been made an equal of angels for this, O venerable father.
